section.title: Projects
section.subtitle: Hands-on work across data analytics, automation, and visualization

categories.label: SQL
categories.description: SQL querying, optimization, and analytical problem solving.

project.name: SQL Problems & Solutions
project.summary: Complete SQL practice repository covering beginner to advanced problems from sql-practice.com with optimized queries and explanations.

project.name: 15-Day SQL Learning Program
project.summary: Structured 15-day SQL practice using a custom database, ER diagrams, and real-world query patterns.

project.name: LeetCode SQL & DSA Solutions
project.summary: Automatically synced LeetCode solutions using LeetHub, focused on SQL, algorithms, and interview preparation.

categories.label: Python & Data Analysis
categories.description: Data analysis, visualization, and machine learning using Python.

project.name: Titanic Survival Prediction
project.summary: End-to-end ML project with EDA, feature engineering, Random Forest model, and Excel dashboard.

project.name: Uber Data Analysis
project.summary: Exploratory analysis of Uber trip data to identify patterns in ride duration, distance, fare, and time-of-day trends.

categories.label: Automation & ETL
categories.description: Workflow automation, ETL pipelines, and operational tooling using JavaScript.

project.name: Fresh Lead Automation
project.summary: Real-world automation converting emailed CSV files into clean Google Sheets without manual intervention.

project.name: Weekly Intent Lead Processor
project.summary: Automates extraction, filtering, and transformation of weekly lead data received via email.

project.name: DynamicReport ETL
project.summary: Explains a complete XLSB → Power Query → Power Automate → Apps Script ETL loop.

project.name: Automated CSV Extraction
project.summary: Automates extraction, deduplication, and transformation of CSV files from emails into Google Sheets.

categories.label: Web & Portfolio

project.name: Data-Driven Portfolio Website
project.summary: Personal portfolio built with modular JSON-driven architecture using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

project.summary: Lightweight JavaScript-based analytics tooling for quick insights and automation experiments.
